creator: ltning-freebsd@anduin.net
text:
Evolution will not build on 13-CURRENT (r366584) using Poudriere. Build log attached. Also applies to 3.38.0_1.

This has been a problem for several weeks or even months - uncertain when build failures began.

Excerpt:
FAILED: src/mail/CMakeFiles/evolution-mail.dir/e-mail-ui-session.c.o
